description: This pipeline reads in a folder with files and lists all subfolders. It starts by getting the project user directory, then uses this as an input to list all subfolders.

89849824-53a6-437f-ab06-9ef6aa51f091.name: path-to-annotation-simple
89849824-53a6-437f-ab06-9ef6aa51f091.description: Creates an annotation for each path based on its name or its full path.

adbeaf5c-4cc7-42ce-94b1-e9d05747710a.name: project-user-directory
adbeaf5c-4cc7-42ce-94b1-e9d05747710a.description: Returns a project user (Project > Project settings > User directories) folder as data
